description: Context management hooks for training-monitor Ralph mode. Only injects compact instructions when monitoring-logs/ exists in the working directory AND the conversation appears to be a monitoring session.

hooks.command:
if [ -d monitoring-logs ]; then echo 'IF this conversation involves training monitoring (look for: monitoring steps, gate logs, GPU checks, nvidia-smi output, training metrics, monitoring-logs/ paths, job state references):

You are summarizing a conversation that is part of a RECURRING MONITORING LOOP (Ralph loop pattern). After this compaction, the agent will wake up with ONLY your summary as context -- everything else is gone. The agent needs to seamlessly continue the monitoring work as if no interruption happened.

What the agent needs to recover:
- Which monitoring STEP it was on when compaction happened (the 9-step training-monitor procedure: predict, collect, compare, metrics, resources, review, troubleshoot, strategize, write-state)
- If mid-step: what exactly it was doing, what commands it ran, what it found so far, what remains to be done
- The job identifier and path to the persistent state file (monitoring-logs/jobs/<job-id>.json)
- Any user preferences or instructions that affect behavior (autonomous vs human-in-loop, authority level, monitoring target description)
- Any anomalies or critical findings discovered so far in this monitoring pass

What the agent does NOT need (because it is saved in files):
- Completed step details -- these are in gate log files under monitoring-logs/<timestamp>/
- Historical monitoring data -- this is in the per-job state JSON
- The full training-monitor procedure -- the agent will re-read the skill
- Domain skill content (grpo-monitor, k8s-monitor, etc.) -- loaded on demand

Optimize your summary for CONTINUABILITY, not comprehensiveness. The agent first action after reading your summary will be to check the gate logs and job state file to fill in details. Your summary just needs to get it oriented.

OTHERWISE (if this conversation is NOT about training monitoring):
Ignore all of the above and compress normally.'; fi
